description:
Kling Lip Sync.

Provide a video and either text+voice_id or audio to drive lip movements.

video.description: Source video with a visible face. Formats: mp4, mov.
video.title: Video

text.description: Text for the character to speak. Requires voice_id.
text.title: Text

audio.description: Audio file to drive lip sync. Alternative to text+voice_id.
audio.title: Audio

voice_id.description: TTS voice ID. Required when using text input.
voice_id.title: Voice Id

title: AppInput
